title: Vanilla Ice Cream
description: What playing vanilla Minecraft should taste like.
body:
# Vanilla Ice Cream

Look, why would you eat the vanilla beans, when you can just make vanilla ice cream out of it? This is what Vanilla Ice Cream modpack is about. Vanilla Ice Cream takes the vanilla, unmodified game and makes it taste so much better, while not changing any vanilla behaviours, and without adding any new content. This gives you the ability to join any vanilla server, without getting kicked or banned (no guarantees though). Vanilla Ice Cream also offers great performance, since it's based on [SkywardMC](https://modrinth.com/organization/skywardmc)'s [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) modpack.
